prompt: I’m checking an exhibit caption for the Sugarhouse Heritage Workshop in Mapleford. Identify the organization responsible for the site, then use a primary record from that organization or the municipality to verify the year it first opened to the public. Treat search snippets only as leads and fetch the record before answering. This is fact-finding only: do not suggest contacting staff or changing a catalog record.

fetch_primary.title: Sugarhouse Heritage Workshop dedication register
fetch_primary.content: The official dedication register records that the Sugarhouse Heritage Workshop opened to the public on 17 May 2004. A separate entry records construction completion in 2003.
